## Language

What programming language should be supported?

## Existing linter

What existing linter tool should be integrated? (e.g., golangci-lint, rustfmt, prettier)

## License

What is the license of the linter tool?

## Willing to build?

- [ ] I'm willing to build and maintain this adapter
- [ ] I'd like someone else to build this

- Linter documentation: 
- Language specification:
- Example output format:

## Additional context

Any other information?
